bounty_scroll.title: Find The Rec Bounty scroll (found in Bountiful bounty board structures, village raid loot chests)

decree.title: Post a Decree on a Bountiful Bounty Board — set a high-tier bounty for resource collection or boss kill

subtitle.text: Post a Decree. Collect a Bounty. The Kingdom You Build runs on contracts. Start writing them.

description: CH.12 · THE BOUNTY BOARD
▸ Bountiful adds the Bounty Board system.
Bounties: tasks the world posts for you to complete.
Decrees: tasks you post for your kingdom to fulfill.
In Ch12, the economy of the Kingdom runs on these.
The scroll teaches you to read the board.
◈ BOUNTIFUL SYSTEM
└ Bounty Board: placed in villages or player bases
└ Bounties: auto-generated tasks (kill X, collect Y)
Reward: emeralds, rare items, experience, coins
└ Bounties refresh over time — check the board daily
└ High-tier bounties: Cataclysm boss kills, rare item
collection — worth significant reward
◈ DECREES
└ Decree: player-posted bounty for others
In multiplayer: other players can complete your decrees
└ In singleplayer: Villager Recruits fulfill Decrees
(configured via Bountiful + Recruits integration)
└ Decree types: resource gathering, combat, crafting
└ Post Decrees for: Ancient Debris, rare boss loot,
Cataclysm materials you need farmed passively
◈ ECONOMY INTEGRATION
└ Numismatics coins: used in bounty board rewards
and as Decree payment currency
└ Cog → Ring → Crown → Diamond value chain
└ High-value Decrees pay in Crowns
(numismatics:crown = highest denomination)
└ Via Romana merchants: bounty adjacent trade economy
◈ SCROLL: Rec Bounty
└ Found in Bountiful bounty board structures,
village raid loot, military outpost chests
└ Research time: 15 min
└ Unlocks: full Bountiful board system,
Decree mechanics, economy integration guide
▸ The first bounty board was a rock with
scratched marks on it.
The second was a board with nails.
The Kingdom started when the board had more
bounties than one person could complete.
That is when it needed more than one person.
▶ Find The Rec Bounty scroll [check]
▶ Post a Decree on a Bounty Board [check]
◇ Bounty Board + Villager Recruits + MCA Reborn =
a functioning economy in singleplayer.
The Kingdom has three institutions.
Build all three before Ch13.
